title: CNBC Daily Open: Iran ceasefire on life support, but market volatility is alive and kicking
summary_full: Despite claiming that Iran's military is defeated and that Washington "has all the cards" in the conflict, Trump has yet to force Tehran to come to a deal.
summary_public: Despite claiming that Iran's military is defeated and that Washington "has all the cards" in the conflict, Trump has yet to force Tehran to come to a deal.
